summary: Plan-only inventory classification completed for five open PRs. No PR has complete merge preflight proof; each needs a specific maintainer or preflight decision before merge, repair, or replacement can be recommended.

actions.reason: Feature/config surface appears useful and focused, but merge cannot be recommended without current mergeability, resolved bot-review proof, and a clean Codex /review on the latest head.
Active author-followup state, failing behavior proof, and unresolved review/preflight evidence require maintainer decision before repair, replacement, or merge can be planned.
The PR is high-impact session/message-delivery work with a large test-heavy diff; merge requires maintainer review intent plus current mergeability and Codex /review preflight.
This is the narrowest candidate in the shard, but merge_candidate is blocked until current mergeability and Codex /review preflight are proven and the re-review-loop status is cleared.
The PR is broad generated-locale UI work with linked split-scope context; maintainer confirmation and complete current merge preflight are needed before merge or repair can be recommended.

needs_human: #51067: decide whether to proceed with the configurable Control UI title feature after current mergeability, bot-review resolution, and Codex /review are proven.
#55901: decide whether to keep waiting for the author, repair the IRC multiline branch, or replace it after failed behavior proof and review-bot history.
#93266: review the large Feishu session/message-delivery change and require current Codex /review plus mergeability before any merge recommendation.
#93585: clear the re-review-loop state and run current Codex /review/mergeability proof before this small daemon PR can be considered merge-ready.
#91210: confirm the broad generated i18n locale update and split-scope relationship to #79745 before merge or repair planning.
